title: Bartoline White Spirit 500ml – High-Quality Paint Thinner & Brush Cleaner for DIY (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
TOP-QUALITY PAINT THINNER: Perfect for thinning solvent-based and oil-based paints, ensuring smooth and even application without affecting the drying time of the paint.
EFFECTIVE BRUSH CLEANER: Easily cleans paint brushes, rollers, and tools, removing paint residue and extending their lifespan for continued use.
IDEAL FOR PAINT SPILLS & CLEANUP: Quickly removes paint spills and splashes from surfaces, preventing stains and ensuring easy cleanup after painting projects.
COMPLIANT WITH BS245 STANDARDS: Refined to meet the strict requirements of BS245, providing reliable, high-quality performance for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
VERSATILE & MULTI-PURPOSE: Widely used for general DIY cleaning, paint thinning, and cleaning tools, making it a must-have in any painting or decorating toolkit.
